I noticed professionally that we both have a focus on environmental stewardship.  There has been a lot of “buzz” created by various investors, such as Larry Fink at BlackRock, relative to its investments taking environmental action. How does Annaly measure and manage the climate risk of its portfolio companies?

Schneider Electric was recently named the most sustainable company in the world by Corporate Knights for our ESG performance.  We work with thousands of companies as a sustainability advisor and strategic partner with our team of over 2,000 experts.   

Would you consider having a brief discussion to see if we might be a resource for Annaly? 
  
Respectfully,  
Jon

FernauLeblanc  David Quesenbury was quoting them IDM
Hello Steve, 

As an investment firm you may just now be starting to feel pressures relative to environmental reporting. There has been a lot of “buzz” created by various investors, such as Larry Fink at BlackRock, relative to its investments taking environmental action, and tenants are becoming more vocal as well. From research I have done I was not able to find any information on Fernau Leblanc relative to its position on the Environment. 

I was wondering if Fernau Leblanc is working on, and planning to make a formal ESG statement?

We work with thousands of companies as a sustainability advisor and strategic partner with our team of over 2,000 experts.   Recently Schneider Electric was named the most sustainable company in the world by Corporate Knights for our ESG performance.  

Would you consider having a brief discussion to see if we might be a resource for Fernau Leblanc? 
  
Respectfully,  
Jon 

P.S. – If this topic is not in your wheel house can you direct me to the right person.  Additionally, you might find our Climate Advisory Services to be interesting.
